title: AWS推出专门针对医疗保健的新人工智能代理平台
content: AWS 正在推出 Amazon Connect Health，这是一个人工智能代理平台，将有助于患者安排、文档记录和患者验证。
original_title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
original_content: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

title: 独家：Luma 推出由新“统一智能”模型支持的创意人工智能代理
content: Luma 推出了 Luma Agents，由其新的“统一智能”模型提供支持，旨在协调多个人工智能系统并生成跨文本、图像、视频和音频的端到端创意作品。
original_title: EXCLUSIVE: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
original_content: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

title: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4 Pro 和 Thinking 版本
content: GPT-5.4 被誉为“我们最有能力、最高效的专业工作前沿模型”。
original_title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versions
original_content: GPT-5.4 is billed as "our most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work."

title: 各大航空公司禁止在英国机场每日 24 趟航班中出现“裸打者”

title: OpenAI 已禁止军事用途。五角大楼无论如何都通过微软测试了其模型
content: 消息人士称，在 ChatGPT 制造商解除对军事应用的禁令之前，国防部曾试验过微软版本的 OpenAI 技术。
original_title: OpenAI Had Banned Military Use. The Pentagon Tested Its Models Through Microsoft Anyway
original_content: Sources allege the Defense Department experimented with Microsoft’s version of OpenAI technology before the ChatGPT-maker lifted its prohibition on military applications.
